basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Project Consultant, Research Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Project Consultant, Research Engineer and More
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 notification for 14 Project Consultant, Principal Project Scientist, Project Scientist, Research Associate, Sr. Research Engineer, Research Engineer, and Jr. Research Engineer posts. Candidates with qualifications such as Ph.D., M.Tech, B.Tech, M.Sc, MCA, and relevant experience are eligible to apply.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., M.Tech, B.Tech, M.Sc, MCA, MS, MD, MDS, MVSc, M.Pharma, ME
qualification.details: Project Consultant: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in the appropriate branch with a minimum of 10-year industrial experience after PhD OR an outstanding Technologist with 1st class post graduate degree in relevant discipline working in industry and having minimum of 10 years. Principal Project Scientist: MTech 1st class or equivalent in EE/ECE/IT/CSE.Maths OR BTech/MSc/MCA 1st Class or equivalent in EE/ECE/IT/CSE/Maths with 06 years experience. Project Scientist: B.Tech with GATE qualification/ MSc with NET/SET qualification/ MCA with GATE qualification 1st class or equivalent in EE/ECE/IT/CSE/Maths. Research Associate: PhD/MS/MD/MDS or equivalent degree OR having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVsc/ M.pharma / ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper science citation (SCI}Journal. Sr. Research Engineer: First class B.Tech or equivalent in appropriate discipline with two years of relevant experience OR 1st class M.Tech or equivalent in appropriate discipline. Research Engineer: First class B.Tech or equivalent in appropriate discipline with one year of relevant experience OR 1st class M.Tech or equivalent in appropriate discipline. Jr. Research Engineer: First class B.Tech or equivalent in appropriate discipline. One Year relevant experience is desirable.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for detailed selection process information.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Consultant posts is 24 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for various project-based positions at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these IIT Delhi jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is through Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Consultant post, a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in the appropriate branch with a minimum of 10-year industrial experience after PhD is required, or an outstanding Technologist with a 1st class post-graduate degree and 10 years of industry experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Consultant position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Consultant post ranges from Rs. 1,06,650 to Rs. 1,39,150/- per month plus HRA @30%.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for IIT Delhi recruitment is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q8. What type of jobs are these at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: These are project-based appointments, meaning they are on a contractual basis for specific research projects.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/116/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What are the technical skills required for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: For the Project Scientist post, required technical skills include good knowledge of computer communication systems and protocols, embedded programming proficiency in Python, Embedded C, C, and good understanding of circuits.
